response.overview: This is the hour of stand up I toured with after I shot “Grow or Die.”  I never technically shot it as a “special” but that not happening wasn’t intentional. Relationships of mine changed, and some of the things in the set evolved in my life, so I just kind of stopped doing it because other topics became more important to me personally, culturally, and as a stand-up.  Because of that, I just… kept writing so much and eventually had a whole new hour on tour to do. These stories just kind of fell by the wayside.  So what you’re watching here is raw and not cut how I would normally have it cut. Even though it’s not technically a special I had tons of footage of it… and it’s still special to me.  So I’m dropping this here on my birthday… as a “thank you” to everyone who ever supported me by coming to a show, and even those who haven’t.  So here it is.  The ‘B Side’ special
response.title: Chris D'Elia: The 'B Side' Special
